fields.title: Can Sleep While Riding
fields.description: If true, the mob will be able to use the sleep goal if riding something

fields.title: Cooldown Time
fields.description: Time in seconds the mob has to wait before using the goal again

fields.title: Priority
fields.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

fields.title: Sleep Collider Height
fields.description: The height of the mob's collider while sleeping

fields.title: Sleep Collider Width
fields.description: The width of the mob's collider while sleeping

fields.title: Sleep y Offset
fields.description: The y offset of the mob's collider while sleeping

fields.title: Speed Multiplier
fields.description: Movement speed multiplier of the mob when using this goal.

fields.title: Timeout Cooldown
fields.description: The cooldown time in seconds before the goal can be reused after a internal failure or timeout condition.

description: Allows mobs that own a bed to in a village to move to and sleep in it.
title: Entity Sleep Behavior
